ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_code" TEXT /* Internal code for the company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is based */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Default currency used by the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the company */,
  "company_type" TEXT /* Type of the company (e.g., parent, subsidiary) */,
  "parent_company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent company */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_partners" (
  "trading_partner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading partner */,
  "trading_partner_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading partner */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the trading partner is based */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the trading partner */,
  "trading_partner_type" TEXT /* Type of the trading partner (e.g., supplier, customer) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the trading partner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trading_partner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company involved in the transaction */,
  "posting_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was posted */,
  "document_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction document was created */,
  "trading_partner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading partner involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., AR, AP) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the transaction data (e.g., SAP) */,
  "data_category" TEXT /* Category of the transaction data (e.g., ACTUAL) */,
  "account" INTEGER /* Account number for the transaction */,
  "transaction_amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "inter_company_transaction" TEXT /* Indicator for inter-company transactions (Y/N) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, processed, cancelled) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment for the transaction */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_trading_partner_id FOREIGN KEY ("trading_partner_id") REFERENCES trading_partners ("trading_partner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_data_category FOREIGN KEY ("data_category") REFERENCES data_categories ("data_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_transaction_type FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_type") REFERENCES transaction_types ("transaction_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("data_source") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_account FOREIGN KEY ("account") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "transaction_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type (e.g., AR, AP) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  "transaction_type_group" TEXT /* Group of the transaction type (e.g., revenue, expense) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., SAP) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., internal, external) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_categories" (
  "data_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data category */,
  "data_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the data category (e.g., ACTUAL, BUDGET) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data category */,
  "data_category_group" TEXT /* Group of the data category (e.g., financial, operational) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "account_number" INTEGER /* Account number */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of the account (e.g., Asset, Liability, Equity, Revenue, Expense) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the account */,
  "account_group" TEXT /* Group of the account (e.g., assets, liabilities, equity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Code of the currency (e.g., USD, CAD) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency (e.g., US Dollar, Canadian Dollar) */,
  "exchange_rate_to_base" REAL /* Exchange rate to the base currency */,
  "currency_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency (e.g., $, €) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_rates" (
  "exchange_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange rate */,
  "from_currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source currency */,
  "to_currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target currency */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate from the source to the target currency */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the exchange rate */,
  "exchange_rate_type" TEXT /* Type of the exchange rate (e.g., spot, forward) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inter_company_transactions" (
  "inter_company_transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inter-company transaction */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company involved in the transaction */,
  "trading_partner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading partner (company) involved in the transaction */,
  "transfer_amount" REAL /* Amount of the transfer */,
  "transfer_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transfer */,
  "inter_company_transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the inter-company transaction (e.g., sales, purchases) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inter_company_transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inter_company_transactions_trading_partner_id FOREIGN KEY ("trading_partner_id") REFERENCES trading_partners ("trading_partner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inter_company_transactions_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inter_company_transactions_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., accountant, manager) */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the user belongs to */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, accountant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the transaction */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)
